name: HIMS Co., Ltd.
summary: HIMS Co., Ltd. develops and sells inspection module, machine on display, semiconductor, factory automation (FA), and other products in South Korea. It offers display field products, such as mask stretchers, mask repair products, mask inspectors, and glass AOI products; FA field products, including IR filter inspection system, blood sugar check sheet inspectors, RVI inspectors, and CCFL inspectors; and semiconductor field products. The company also provides vision modules; and vision components comprising light control boards, light power source products, IO boards, IO terminal blocks, CCD cameras, and CMOS cameras, as well as deals in Teledyne Delsa frame grabbers and software products, and JAI cameras. HIMS Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Incheon, South Korea.
